title: cyperus zollingerianus
intro: Cyperus zollingerianus, also known as the giant umbrella sedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is a perennial plant that is native to Southeast Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus zollingerianus include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a diuretic. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and roots are typically dried and used in tea or tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
